events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Kaiser Permanente San Francisco for client 1019. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 700 mg/meal, carbs 40–70 g/meal. Prefers Chinese; dislikes eggplant. Cooking ability: microwave. 10 meals/week, zone SoMa.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Beef and Broccoli with Brown Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'cardiovascular': meal lacks 'heart-healthy' tag.

events.title: Rejected: Mild Mapo Tofu with Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'cardiovascular': meal lacks 'heart-healthy' tag.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/700 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 40–70) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 364/700 mg ✓, carbs 49 g (target 40–70) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Steamed Fish with Ginger and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 435/700 mg ✓, carbs 50 g (target 40–70) ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1019 added to route R-SOMA-1 (SoMa), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1019: 10 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
